name: dev
description: Multi-agent development team orchestrator. A lead Opus 4.6 agent assumes the team lead role, pulls kanban stories via scrum-master integration, dispatches Opus developer/reviewer/fix-pass subagents + Codex, runs each story through a full dev-review-rework cycle, and dynamically routes tasks to the best available skill/plugin/MCP. Scales to large batches via sequential waves from the primary lead. Fully autonomous with session-scoped stop-hook gating.
